title: delphinium pedatisectum subsp. pedatisectum
intro: Delphinium pedatisectum subsp. pedatisectum, also known as the cut-leaved delphinium, is a perennial plant species native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, with properties that include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Delphinium pedatisectum subsp. pedatisectum include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
